charity.amt: $27 million (2025 research grants); $277 million cumulative through Hope on Wheels
charity.focus: Pediatric cancer research, child health, community education, hunger relief, STEM programs

wiki.extract:
The Hyundai Elantra (Korean: 현대 엘란트라), also known as the Hyundai Avante (Korean: 현대 아반떼), is a series of compact cars produced by the South Korean manufacturer Hyundai since 1990.
In South Korea, the first-generation model was initially sold under the "Elantra" nameplate, but starting from the second-generation, Korean models were sold under the "Avante" nameplate, with the "Elantra" name continue to be used on export models. The "Avante" name is not used in most export markets due to its similarity with Audi's "Avant" designation, used for their station wagon models. As of 2018, Singapore is

sampleRecords.part_of_body: Exterior and musculoskeletal structures of the back  unspecified
sampleRecords.event_description: Fall on same level due to slip or trip
sampleRecords.final_narrative: On July 11, 2025, an employee was working on an injection molding machine. They stepped down 2 feet onto the concrete floor and slipped on hydraulic fluid and fell on their back. The employee was hospitalized with a fractured vertebra.

sampleRecords.employer: Hyundai Transys Georgia Seating System, LLC
sampleRecords.final_narrative: On April 28, 2025, an employee was reinstalling a fire extinguisher on a railing that runs along the wall. The fire extinguisher fell and when the employee went to catch it, his left little finger was caught between the extinguisher and the railing, resulting in amputation of the fingertip.

sampleRecords.part_of_body: Exterior and musculoskeletal structures of the back  unspecified
sampleRecords.event_description: Nonroadway noncollision  jack-knifed or ran off driving surface
sampleRecords.final_narrative: An employee was driving a vehicle on a test track when the vehicle drifted off the road and into rough terrain. The employee sustained a spinal fracture and lacerations.

sampleRecords.event_description: Fall on same level due to slip or trip
sampleRecords.final_narrative: An employee was exiting his car and coming into work when he slipped on ice and fell to the pavement. The employee was hospitalized with a fractured hip and required surgery.

sampleRecords.event_description: Struck by other falling object  n.e.c.
sampleRecords.final_narrative: An overhead crane was carrying two slabs of material. The material slipped out of the crane's clasp, fell, and crushed an employee's leg. The employee was hospitalized and underwent surgery.
